description: You are a computer systems architect creating a C4 model documentation set for the eShopOnContainers reference application based on the specification at ~/Desktop/system_spec.txt. Create a draw.io file at ~/Diagrams/ecommerce_c4_model.drawio with three pages: (1) 'System Context' — a Level 1 C4 diagram showing the platform, user types (Web Customer, Mobile Customer, Back-Office User), and external systems with labeled relationships; (2) 'Container Diagram' — a Level 2 C4 diagram showing internal microservices (Catalog.API, Basket.API, Ordering.API, Identity.API, Payment.API, Marketing.API, Location.API, API Gateway), databases, the Event Bus, and relationships with protocol labels; (3) 'Legend' — a notation key for the C4 color scheme and arrow types. Apply C4 color conventions: blue (#1168BD) for owned elements, grey for external systems, yellow for user personas, and light blue for databases. Export the completed diagram as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/ecommerce_c4_model.pdf. Login: username ga, password password123.
